languages.original_text: "Signs of xenoheresy have been detected on the station Tirkuaz-4. For what reason was the decision made to leave it intact?"

languages.text: "На станции Тиркуаз-4 были зафиксированы признаки ксеноереси. По какой причине было принято решение оставить ее в неприкосновенности?"
"Signs of xenoheresy have been detected on the station Tirkuaz-4. For what reason was the decision made to leave it intact?"
languages.original_text: "На станции Тиркуаз-4 были зафиксированы признаки ксеноереси. По какой причине было принято решение оставить ее в неприкосновенности?"

traits.locale_text: "Signs of xenoheresy have been detected on the station Tirkuaz-4. For what reason was the decision made to leave it intact?"
"Signs of xenoheresy have been detected on the station Tirkuaz-4. For what reason was the decision made to leave it intact?"
"Signs of xenoheresy have been detected on the station Tirkuaz-4. For what reason was the decision made to leave it intact?"

languages.text: 「ティルクアズ4号基地で異教徒の兆候が検知された。その理由で、そのままにするという判断に至ったのか？」
languages.original_text: "Signs of xenoheresy have been detected on the station Tirkuaz-4. For what reason was the decision made to leave it intact?"

traits.locale_text: 「ティルクアズ4号基地で異教徒の兆候が検知された。その理由で、そのままにするという判断に至ったのか？」

languages.text: « Des signes de xénohérésie ont été détectés sur la station Tirkuaz-4. Pour quelle raison a-t-il été décidé de ne pas la détruire ? »
languages.original_text: "Signs of xenoheresy have been detected on the station Tirkuaz-4. For what reason was the decision made to leave it intact?"

traits.locale_text: « Des signes de xénohérésie ont été détectés sur la station Tirkuaz-4. Pour quelle raison a-t-il été décidé de ne pas la détruire ? »

languages.text: "Auf der Station Tirkuaz-4 wurden Hinweise auf Xeno-Ketzerei festgestellt. Aus welchem Grund wurde beschlossen, sie nicht zu zerstören?"
languages.original_text: "Signs of xenoheresy have been detected on the station Tirkuaz-4. For what reason was the decision made to leave it intact?"

traits.locale_text: "Auf der Station Tirkuaz-4 wurden Hinweise auf Xeno-Ketzerei festgestellt. Aus welchem Grund wurde beschlossen, sie nicht zu zerstören?"

languages.text: "Tirkuaz-4 istasyonunda zeno kâfirliği belirtileri tespit edildi. Ne gerekçeyle bu duruma müdahale edilmemesine karar verildi?"
languages.original_text: "Signs of xenoheresy have been detected on the station Tirkuaz-4. For what reason was the decision made to leave it intact?"

traits.locale_text: "Tirkuaz-4 istasyonunda zeno kâfirliği belirtileri tespit edildi. Ne gerekçeyle bu duruma müdahale edilmemesine karar verildi?"

languages.text: «Se han detectado indicios de xenoherejía en la estación Tirkuaz-4. ¿Con qué motivo se ha tomado la decisión de dejarla intacta?».
languages.original_text: "Signs of xenoheresy have been detected on the station Tirkuaz-4. For what reason was the decision made to leave it intact?"

traits.locale_text: «Se han detectado indicios de xenoherejía en la estación Tirkuaz-4. ¿Con qué motivo se ha tomado la decisión de dejarla intacta?».

languages.text: “在提库阿兹4号星站检测到异形造物的迹象。为什么会决定保留其原状？”
languages.original_text: "Signs of xenoheresy have been detected on the station Tirkuaz-4. For what reason was the decision made to leave it intact?"

traits.locale_text: “在提库阿兹4号星站检测到异形造物的迹象。为什么会决定保留其原状？”
